findings.title: Ledger referential and validity checks
findings.risk: Hard failures would break trusted expense totals and receipt traceability.
findings.recommendation: No hard ledger failures found in the current database snapshot.

findings.title: Nutrition analysis coverage
findings.risk: Failed food items are skipped or materially weaken plate/PDI scoring.
findings.recommendation: Prioritize alias review, then missing weights, then unit normalization.

findings.title: OCR confidence scale normalization
findings.risk: A fixed 0.5 threshold only works for 0..1 confidence values.
findings.recommendation: Use the detected scale threshold in audits and normalize confidence before future scoring.

findings.title: Transaction subtotal/item reconciliation needs review
findings.risk: Discounts, delivery fees, and subtotals can make naive item-sum comparisons misleading.
findings.recommendation: Keep these as needs_review until the receipt arithmetic rule is finalized.
